Riley Bennett
Toledo, OH

WAREHOUSE ASSOCIATE
Midwest Home Supply | 2021-2026

- Picked, packed, labeled, and staged customer orders for daily carrier pickup.
- Operated forklifts, pallet jacks, handheld scanners, and packing equipment
  while following warehouse safety procedures.
- Checked item numbers, quantities, and shipping labels for accuracy before
  orders left the facility.
- Replenished inventory locations and reported damaged or missing products to
  the shift supervisor.
- Participated in cycle counts and helped reconcile physical inventory with
  printed count sheets.
- Trained new associates on picking routes, scanner use, packing standards, and
  safe equipment operation.
- Coordinated with customer service and receiving teams when orders were delayed
  or inventory records were incorrect.
- Helped reorganize high-volume products to reduce walking time during peak
  shipping periods.
- Documented shift handoffs and unresolved fulfillment issues for the next team.
- Maintained a clean work area and completed end-of-shift equipment checks.

EDUCATION

High school diploma
